phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Miradouro do Castelo offers panoramic views of Lisbon from the castle grounds.

likely_response.local: O Miradouro do Castelo fica dentro do Castelo de São Jorge.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH SOWN ZHAW-ruh-zhih.
likely_response.translation_en: The Castle Viewpoint is inside São Jorge Castle.

responses.english: The Castle Viewpoint is inside São Jorge Castle.
responses.phonetic: AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH SOWN ZHAW-ruh-zhih.
responses.french: O Miradouro do Castelo fica dentro do Castelo de São Jorge.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff prioritize direct spatial references over lengthy explanations.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Castle Viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Castle Viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Castelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle gardens are
phrases.text_local: Como chego aos jardins do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo UHOOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct commands are standard for navigation in crowded attractions.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os jardins.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the gardens.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the gardens.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os jardins.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Miradouro do Castelo
phrases.text_local: Qual o caminho mais rápido para o miradouro?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic venues rely on slope and ramp directions for navigation.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Miradouro do Castelo.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Miradouro do Castelo.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Castelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Torre de Ulisses is located
phrases.text_local: Em que parte do castelo está a Torre de Ulisses?
phrases.pronunciation: ayn-KEE PAR-chee doo kas-TEH-loo es-TAH ah TOH-ree jee-(blend)oo-lee-SEHS
phrases.cultural_note: Staff use clear landmarks for orientation within historic sites.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, encontra-se junto à cisterna.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located next to the cistern.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located next to the cistern.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, encontra-se junto à cisterna.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Museu Arqueológico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO uh-ruh-kihoo-LAW-zhee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Archaeological Museum.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Archaeological Museum.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO uh-ruh-kihoo-LAW-zhee-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Museu Arqueológico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle gardens are
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde ficam os Jardins do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: The gardens offer a quiet escape with panoramic views of Lisbon.

likely_response.local: Siga à esquerda após o Pátio da Cisterna.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh AH SHKEH-ruh-duh uh-PAWSH AW PAHT-yoo DUH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow left after the Cistern Courtyard.

responses.english: Follow left after the Cistern Courtyard.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh AH SHKEH-ruh-duh uh-PAWSH AW PAHT-yoo DUH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh.
responses.french: Siga à esquerda após o Pátio da Cisterna.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Museu Arqueológico no interior do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO uh-ruh-kihoo-LAW-zhee-koo NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Archaeological Museum inside the Castle.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Archaeological Museum inside the Castle.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO uh-ruh-kihoo-LAW-zhee-koo NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Museu Arqueológico no interior do Castelo.
